tool_uses.name: Agent
tool_uses.input:
{"subagent_type": "general-purpose", "description": "Find cross-module call sites", "prompt": "I need to understand how public functions from the runtime crate are used across the entire Rust workspace at /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust/.

First, read the file /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust/crates/runtime/src/lib.rs to see what modules and items are publicly re-exported.

Then, search the entire workspace (all crates under rust/crates/) for imports or uses of the runtime crate. Specifically:
1. Grep for `use runtime::` across all .rs files in rust/crates/ (excluding the runtime crate itself)
2. Grep for `runtime::` across all .rs files in rust/crates/ (excluding the runtime crate itself) to find qualified usage
3. Also check the tests/ directory inside the runtime crate for function usage patterns — grep for function calls there too.

Return comprehensive results with file paths and line numbers showing which runtime functions are actually called from outside the runtime crate's own src/ modules."}
